questions.text: What is your contractual SLA for high-severity alert delivery, and what is your measured median latency?
Which network and identity vendors do you integrate with out of the box?
Do you hold SOC 2 Type II? Who is your auditor and when was the last report issued?
Describe your endpoint agent footprint (CPU/memory) and update mechanism.
What is the minimum contract term and are multi-year discounts offered?
Where is your company headquartered and how many employees do you have?
